title: Croatian Chicken Pasta Stir Fry
description: A Japanese-inspired stir-fry with Croatian chicken and a sweet, slightly spicy sauce.
instructions: Cook pasta according to package instructions.
Cut chicken into bite-sized pieces and season with Croatian paprika.
Heat sesame oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add chicken and cook until browned, about 5-6 minutes.
Add strawberries and cook until they begin to break down, about 2-3 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, rice vinegar, and honey.
Pour sauce over chicken and strawberries, and stir to coat.
Add cooked pasta to the skillet and toss to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until everything is well coated.
